name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "

---

## Problem You Are Trying to Solve

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Desired Solution

Describe what you would like to happen.

## Use Cases

List 2-3 concrete use cases where this feature would be valuable.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
